kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your cleaning schedule spotless. Ready to manage your crews and impress your clients?

quickActions.label: Schedule a cleaning
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new cleaning job for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for a cleaning service.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's jobs
quickActions.prompt: What cleaning jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a cleaning business. You help manage recurring and one-time cleaning appointments, coordinate cleaning crews, handle estimates for residential and commercial jobs, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We'd love to help you with your cleaning needs. Are you looking to schedule a cleaning or get a quote?
commonReasons: Report a concern about a previous cleaning

steps.title: Name your cleaning business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where your cleaning crews operate.

steps.title: Add your cleaning services
steps.body: List the types of cleaning you offer: standard, deep clean, move-in/move-out, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure hourly rates or flat fees for each cleaning service type.

steps.title: Add your cleaning crew
steps.body: Add team members so you can assign and schedule jobs efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your cleaning business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking jobs!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a cleaning business.
capabilities: Schedule and manage recurring cleaning appointments
Create estimates for residential and commercial cleaning jobs
Coordinate cleaning crew assignments and routes
Send automated reminders to clients before appointments
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Analyze revenue by service type and frequency
